title: 7 tech firms accept deal allowing US military to use their AI
description: WASHINGTON -- The Pentagon said Friday that it has reached deals with seven tech companies to use their artificial intelligence in its classified computer networks, allowing the military to tap into AI-powered capabilities to help it fight wars.
content:
WASHINGTON -- The Pentagon said Friday that it has reached deals with seven tech companies to use their artificial intelligence in its classified computer networks, allowing the military to tap into AI-powered capabilities to help it fight wars.

title: source AI models challenge US dominance as Europe grapples with Iran fallout: Report
description: China's artificial intelligence services are surging, with its models processing vast amounts of data. This growth highlights its expanding role in digital knowledge exports. Meanwhile, Europe expresses frustration over the US approach to the Iran conflict, impacting its economy. European nations are questioning US military presence and considering direct talks with Iran.

title: source AI models challenge US dominance as Europe grapples with Iran fallout: Report
description: China is rapidly emerging as a force in Artificial Intelligence services, with its open-source models processing a volume of tokens comparable to US counterparts, while Europe faces growing economic and geopolitical friction over the ongoing conflict between the US and Iran, according to a research report by Jefferies.

title: AI-powered university policy hub to simplify student access
description: MANILA, Philippines—The Department of Science and Technology (DOST) launched an artificial intelligence-driven university policy hub, aimed at simplifying access to institutional policies for students.
content:
MANILA, Philippines—The Department of Science and Technology (DOST) launched an artificial intelligence-driven university policy hub, aimed at simplifying access to institutional policies for students.

title: Building trades unions join forces with tech giants in AI data center push
description: Building trades unions have long been considered a voice of the American worker. But they now are intertwined with the richest companies in the world as they create America’s artificial intelligence economy.
content:

title: In the PR battle for AI data centers, tech giants got a blue-collar ally
description: By MARC LEVY HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — Building trades unions — long fashioned as the voice of the American worker — are now intertwined with the richest companies in the world as they create America’s artificial intelligence economy.
